records.m_Talk_ENG: You seem to be the TASKFORCE best equipped to break through.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is an individual entity that's controlling the <color=#ffd34c>C.O. horde</color> in the middle of enemy territory.

records.m_Talk_FRA: We must take down that entity. We have to make it hard for it to control its underlings, at least.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we succeed, we will be able to stop their unified attacks.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we succeed, we will be able to stop their unified attacks.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we succeed, we will be able to stop their unified attacks.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Affirmative. I'll count on you to make an opening.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Affirmative. I'll count on you to make an opening.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Affirmative. I'll count on you to make an opening.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Knights, change formation to charging position!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Knights, change formation to charging position!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Knights, change formation to charging position!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hold formation! The enemy's alliance is makeshift. Once they're out of supplies, they will collapse!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hold formation! The enemy's alliance is makeshift. Once they're out of supplies, they will collapse!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hold formation! The enemy's alliance is makeshift. Once they're out of supplies, they will collapse!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Our enemies excel in long-range firepower.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Our enemies excel in long-range firepower.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Our enemies excel in long-range firepower.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Take down the ships using the aerial units first!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Take down the ships using the aerial units first!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Take down the ships using the aerial units first!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We will rip them into pieces! Trust us!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We will rip them into pieces! Trust us!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We will rip them into pieces! Trust us!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Squad 8 and 9, turn and block their supply route. Hurry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Squad 8 and 9, turn and block their supply route. Hurry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Squad 8 and 9, turn and block their supply route. Hurry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Krrrrrr... Khhh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Krrrrrr... Khhh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Krrrrrr... Khhh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Y-yes... sir...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Y-yes... sir...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Y-yes... sir...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I'm sorry. Your current state will be buried here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I'm sorry. Your current state will be buried here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I'm sorry. Your current state will be buried here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sir Allen! Reporting!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sir Allen! Reporting!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sir Allen! Reporting!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Outsiders who are mimicking chivalry are coming! Give us your orders!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Outsiders who are mimicking chivalry are coming! Give us your orders!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Outsiders who are mimicking chivalry are coming! Give us your orders!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mimicking chivalry?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mimicking chivalry?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mimicking chivalry?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aaaargh!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aaaargh!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aaaargh!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You damn outsider...! I'll kill you! I'll kill you!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You damn outsider...! I'll kill you! I'll kill you!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You damn outsider...! I'll kill you! I'll kill you!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Professor Birmingham.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Professor Birmingham.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Professor Birmingham.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain Chevalier...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain Chevalier...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain Chevalier...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you here? Aren't the Zodiac Knights in charge of supporting the Administration?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you here? Aren't the Zodiac Knights in charge of supporting the Administration?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you here? Aren't the Zodiac Knights in charge of supporting the Administration?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, normally we would have stayed to secure the conference room.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, normally we would have stayed to secure the conference room.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, normally we would have stayed to secure the conference room.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we hadn't heard of your news, that is.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we hadn't heard of your news, that is.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we hadn't heard of your news, that is.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you doing?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you doing?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you doing?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are ordering around monsters disguised as knights... Is this...
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are ordering around monsters disguised as knights... Is this...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are ordering around monsters disguised as knights... Is this...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is this what you call knights?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is this what you call knights?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is this what you call knights?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...That will be my reply, Captain Chevalier.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...That will be my reply, Captain Chevalier.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...That will be my reply, Captain Chevalier.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why did you step into this hellhole?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why did you step into this hellhole?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why did you step into this hellhole?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You should've... stayed occupied with playing knight with your peers.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You should've... stayed occupied with playing knight with your peers.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You should've... stayed occupied with playing knight with your peers.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We are not playing around!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We are not playing around!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We are not playing around!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, you are.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, you are.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, you are.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Star Guide was a failure and a loser.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Star Guide was a failure and a loser.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Star Guide was a failure and a loser.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Her Star Armament did not contribute at all to saving the world from damnation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Her Star Armament did not contribute at all to saving the world from damnation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Her Star Armament did not contribute at all to saving the world from damnation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You haven't figured it out yet? The truth behind the Order you hold so dear?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You haven't figured it out yet? The truth behind the Order you hold so dear?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You haven't figured it out yet? The truth behind the Order you hold so dear?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Star Guide is all an illusion. And the path you're following...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Star Guide is all an illusion. And the path you're following...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Star Guide is all an illusion. And the path you're following...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Leads to nothing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Leads to nothing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Leads to nothing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You mustn't approach there, Sir Hansol! Those attacks might cost you your life!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You mustn't approach there, Sir Hansol! Those attacks might cost you your life!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You mustn't approach there, Sir Hansol! Those attacks might cost you your life!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But Deputy, the Captain is...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But Deputy, the Captain is...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But Deputy, the Captain is...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff...* *Huff...*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff...* *Huff...*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff...* *Huff...*

records.m_Talk_ENG: You... You of all people. You shouldn't have come here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You... You of all people. You shouldn't have come here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You... You of all people. You shouldn't have come here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you hadn't, you would have thought that there was a misunderstanding.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you hadn't, you would have thought that there was a misunderstanding.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you hadn't, you would have thought that there was a misunderstanding.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you would have continued on, living your life as a knight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you would have continued on, living your life as a knight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you would have continued on, living your life as a knight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you got lucky enough, you would have died not knowing that failure was ahead of you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you got lucky enough, you would have died not knowing that failure was ahead of you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you got lucky enough, you would have died not knowing that failure was ahead of you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe that's why she planted hope for the future...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe that's why she planted hope for the future...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe that's why she planted hope for the future...

records.m_Talk_ENG: She left the starlight to guide the lost back to the right track.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She left the starlight to guide the lost back to the right track.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She left the starlight to guide the lost back to the right track.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then... Why did you say those words?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then... Why did you say those words?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then... Why did you say those words?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You remember it well. It is clear that you are an excellent student.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You remember it well. It is clear that you are an excellent student.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You remember it well. It is clear that you are an excellent student.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But Captain Chevalier, reality is different from our expectations.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But Captain Chevalier, reality is different from our expectations.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But Captain Chevalier, reality is different from our expectations.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those who are hopeful are met with a painful demise.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those who are hopeful are met with a painful demise.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those who are hopeful are met with a painful demise.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And those under the guidance of the stars fall and perish.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And those under the guidance of the stars fall and perish.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And those under the guidance of the stars fall and perish.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's... That's...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's... That's...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's... That's...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You were always dignified, even when everyone mocked you as being a clown.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You were always dignified, even when everyone mocked you as being a clown.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You were always dignified, even when everyone mocked you as being a clown.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You'd be better off as a clown. Do not try to change this cruel reality.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You'd be better off as a clown. Do not try to change this cruel reality.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You'd be better off as a clown. Do not try to change this cruel reality.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you say that you can't...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you say that you can't...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you say that you can't...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will make you not be able to see the dawn of tomorrow here today.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will make you not be able to see the dawn of tomorrow here today.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will make you not be able to see the dawn of tomorrow here today.

root.m_Talk_FRA: The Star Guide is all an illusion. And the path you're following...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Leads to nothing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Leads to nothing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Leads to nothing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Captain!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Captain!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Captain!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You mustn't approach there, Sir Hansol! Those attacks might cost you your life!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You mustn't approach there, Sir Hansol! Those attacks might cost you your life!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You mustn't approach there, Sir Hansol! Those attacks might cost you your life!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But Deputy, the Captain is...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: But Deputy, the Captain is...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: But Deputy, the Captain is...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff...* *Huff...*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff...* *Huff...*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff...* *Huff...*

root.m_Talk_ENG: You... You of all people. You shouldn't have come here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You... You of all people. You shouldn't have come here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You... You of all people. You shouldn't have come here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you hadn't, you would have thought that there was a misunderstanding.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you hadn't, you would have thought that there was a misunderstanding.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you hadn't, you would have thought that there was a misunderstanding.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And you would have continued on, living your life as a knight.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And you would have continued on, living your life as a knight.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And you would have continued on, living your life as a knight.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you got lucky enough, you would have died not knowing that failure was ahead of you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you got lucky enough, you would have died not knowing that failure was ahead of you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you got lucky enough, you would have died not knowing that failure was ahead of you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe that's why she planted hope for the future...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe that's why she planted hope for the future...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe that's why she planted hope for the future...

root.m_Talk_ENG: She left the starlight to guide the lost back to the right track.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She left the starlight to guide the lost back to the right track.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She left the starlight to guide the lost back to the right track.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then... Why did you say those words?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then... Why did you say those words?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then... Why did you say those words?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You remember it well. It is clear that you are an excellent student.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You remember it well. It is clear that you are an excellent student.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You remember it well. It is clear that you are an excellent student.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But Captain Chevalier, reality is different from our expectations.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But Captain Chevalier, reality is different from our expectations.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But Captain Chevalier, reality is different from our expectations.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Those who are hopeful are met with a painful demise.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Those who are hopeful are met with a painful demise.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Those who are hopeful are met with a painful demise.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And those under the guidance of the stars fall and perish.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And those under the guidance of the stars fall and perish.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And those under the guidance of the stars fall and perish.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's... That's...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's... That's...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's... That's...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...You were always dignified, even when everyone mocked you as being a clown.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...You were always dignified, even when everyone mocked you as being a clown.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...You were always dignified, even when everyone mocked you as being a clown.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You'd be better off as a clown. Do not try to change this cruel reality.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You'd be better off as a clown. Do not try to change this cruel reality.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You'd be better off as a clown. Do not try to change this cruel reality.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you say that you can't...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you say that you can't...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you say that you can't...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I will make you not be able to see the dawn of tomorrow here today.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I will make you not be able to see the dawn of tomorrow here today.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I will make you not be able to see the dawn of tomorrow here today.
